summary: Tested 9 reliability assertions: VAL-REL-007 (Cursor Pagination), VAL-REL-008 (Spike Rate Limit), VAL-REL-009 (Password Rate Limit), VAL-REL-010 (Share Rate Limit), VAL-REL-011 (Webhook HMAC), VAL-REL-012 (Webhook URL Validation), VAL-REL-013 (Webhook Retry), VAL-REL-014 (Cache Headers), VAL-REL-016 (Standardized Errors). All assertions passed. The implementation correctly handles pagination with cursor-based navigation, enforces rate limits per IP/token/slug, generates and verifies webhook HMAC-SHA256 signatures, validates webhook URLs against private IPs and non-HTTPS schemes, implements retry logic with 5-second delays, sets appropriate cache headers for HTML vs static assets, and returns consistent error responses with machine-readable codes.
